name: @moritzmyrz/tripletex.js
description: TypeScript SDK for the Tripletex API

scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.generate:resources:prod: openapi-typescript docs/openapi-prod.json -o src/generated/openapi.ts && node scripts/generate-resources.mjs --spec docs/openapi-prod.json
scripts.generate:resources:test: openapi-typescript docs/openapi-test.json -o src/generated/openapi.ts && node scripts/generate-resources.mjs --spec docs/openapi-test.json

author: Moritz André Myrseth <moritzmyrz@gmail.com>
